data.title: Asia-Pacific steel mining industry valued at $677.7B in 2024, projected to reach $1.08T by 2035, driven by growing demand for specialty steel products and technological innovations.
data.description: A report titled "Asia-Pacific Mining Steel Industry Market: Focus on End-User Application, Production Methodology, End Products, and Country - Analysis and Forecast, 2025-2035" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com offerings. In 2024, the Asia-Pacific mining steel industry market was valued at $677.7 billion, with a projected growth at a CAGR of 4.31%. By 2035, the market is expected to reach $1.08 trillion. The mining steel sector in the Asia-Pacific region is experiencing rapid expansion.

data.title: Jacobs wins contract to expand rail capacity at Port of Long Beach, boosting productivity and economic growth.
data.description: Enhancing rail capacity at the Port of Long Beach is set to boost productivity and drive economic growth. Jacobs, a renowned company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol J, has secured a contract to oversee the construction management for the Pier B On-Dock Rail Support project. This initiative aims to double the current rail capacity at the port, signaling a major leap towards increased efficiency and development. The project is expected to have a significant impact, potentially transforming the port into a hub for trade and commerce.

data.title: EverBank plans to offer fixed-to-floating rate subordinated notes, subject to market conditions, as announced on Aug. 7, 2025.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, in Jacksonville, Florida, EverBank Financial Corp disclosed plans to make offerings, contingent on market conditions. EverBank Financial Corp, a financial holding entity, operates banking activities through its wholly owned subsidiary, EverBank, N.A. This announcement does not specify the financial details of the offerings but signals a strategic move for the company.
